title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
